hero_subtitle: SFTY provides executives a consolidated compliance operating view that connects customer, wallet, and transaction risk with audit-ready workflows to strengthen governance and decision clarity.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Risk governance weakens across compliance layers
problem_description: Executives struggle to maintain clear oversight when compliance data and decisions remain siloed across customers, wallets and transactions. This limits audit readiness and creates gaps in operational risk visibility essential for informed governance control.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects customer profiles, wallets, transactions, rules and decisions into a unified compliance layer that delivers audit-ready risk visibility and governance controls across multi-jurisdictional operations.
workflow_title: From provider data to governance controls
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates provider outputs, applies governance rules, routes risk reviews, records decisions and preserves evidence for comprehensive executive risk oversight.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented risk views. Clear governance controls
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives executives a unified compliance layer that links customer, wallet and transaction risk with audit-ready evidence and decision visibility for stronger governance.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs by providing a scalable compliance layer with audit-ready evidence, provider orchestration and controlled deployment for clearer leadership risk oversight.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support executive risk governance controls
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how SFTY connects compliance workflows to leadership views
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports risk governance reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY enables scalable compliance controls for VASPs
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected compliance layer that consolidates risk, compliance workflows, and audit data for VASP executives to oversee operational and regulatory risk efficiently.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support risk governance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects customer, wallet and transaction data with regulatory rules, case workflows and decision logs to enable consistent governance and clear operational visibility across risk areas.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories and supporting evidence in a structured format that supports audit readiness and regulatory review without replacing existing providers.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with your current KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers to connect outputs into one controlled compliance operating model.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above your providers, turning their outputs into structured workflows, cases, regulatory rule updates and audit evidence without replacing any core compliance services.
final_title: Bring risk governance controls into one view
final_description: Explore how SFTY connects wallet, transaction and customer risk into audit-ready governance workflows for executive review.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
